response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level experience in software development, architecture, and team leadership across diverse industries, with a strong focus on open-source technologies and modern development practices. His background includes roles as a Staff Software Engineer and Senior Developer in high-performance environments, along with entrepreneurial experience in building and maintaining open-source platforms. While his German proficiency is listed as 'basic' and his experience in IT architecture/project management could be more explicitly detailed, his technical depth, leadership, and strategic thinking align well with the Head of Development role.
strengths: Extensive experience in senior software development and leadership roles across multiple industries and technologies
Strong background in open-source projects, architecture design, and modern development practices (e.g., Kubernetes, Node.js, Dlang)
Proven track record in mentoring teams, contributing to technical communities, and delivering high-performance solutions (e.g., handling millions of HTTP requests, optimizing pricing strategies)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of formal IT architecture or technical project management experience in leadership roles
German language proficiency is listed as 'basic', which may be a barrier for client-facing communications in German-speaking regions
Lack of direct experience in UML modeling or specific mention of requirements management in past roles
